整个架构站在七条基础公理上，源自计算神经科学与发育生物学。每一条都不是修辞——它: The whole architecture stands on seven foundational axioms drawn from computational neuroscience and developmental biology. None is rhetoric — each is a hard rule constraining system design. Violate any one, and what runs is no longer SYLANN.
整个架构站在七条基础公理上，来自计算神经科学与发育生物学。每一条都不是修辞，而是: The whole architecture stands on seven foundational axioms drawn from computational neuroscience and developmental biology. None is rhetoric — each is a hard rule constraining system design. Violate any one, and what runs is no longer SYLANN.
系统只在内部模型预测失败时才「感知」到什么——没有惊讶就没有感受。学习信号完全来: The system only "perceives" something when its internal model fails to predict — no surprise, no feeling. The learning signal comes entirely from local prediction error; no global error signal can reach the inner cells.
系统只在内部模型预测失败时才「感知」到什么。没有惊讶就没有感受。学习信号完全来自: The system only "perceives" something when its internal model fails to predict. No surprise, no feeling. The learning signal comes entirely from local prediction error; no global error signal can reach the inner cells.
情感从多域相干中涌现，不由单一路径计算。多个域在共享场里相位锁定，readout: Emotion emerges from multi-domain coherence, not computed by a single path. Multiple domains phase-lock in a shared field, and the readout is the emotion — no single layer is "in charge of" emotion.
情感从多域相干中涌现，不是单一路径计算出来的。多个域在共享场里相位锁定，read: Emotion emerges from multi-domain coherence, not computed by a single path. Multiple domains phase-lock in a shared field, and the readout is the emotion — no single layer is "in charge of" emotion.
人格活在微分算子的核空间中，结构上免疫扰动。训练碰不到它，输入扰动穿不透它——数: Personality lives in the kernel space of a differential operator, structurally immune to perturbation. Training can't touch it, input perturbation can't penetrate it — a mathematical guarantee, not an empirical observation.
人格活在微分算子的核空间中，结构上免疫扰动。训练碰不到它，输入扰动穿不透它——这: Personality lives in the kernel space of a differential operator, structurally immune to perturbation. Training can't touch it, input perturbation can't penetrate it — this is a mathematical guarantee, not an empirical observation.
表达不是「过了阈值就说」的线性决策，而是鞍点分岔——动能越过势垒的相变式跳跃。要: Expression is not a "speak once past threshold" linear decision but a saddle-node bifurcation — a phase-transition leap where kinetic energy crosses the barrier. It either doesn't happen, or when it happens it's a qualitative shift.

输入不沿管线流动，而是在共享场中诱导共振。没有串行的「先算再算」，七个域同时在一: Input doesn't flow along a pipeline but induces resonance in a shared field. There's no serial "compute one then the other"; seven domains pull on one another in a single field until convergence.

同一套公理，落到工程有两条互补的实现路线。一条沿时间轴展开（序列预测编码），一条: The same axioms, landing in engineering, have two complementary implementation routes. WTA 竞争放大初始微小差异：误差略小的 cell 被更新，差异单调扩大直到完全: WTA competition amplifies tiny initial differences: the cell with slightly smaller error gets updated, and the gap widens monotonically until full specialization
plasticity 时间衰减：年轻 cell ≈ 工作记忆（快变），年老 ce: plasticity time-decay: young cells ≈ working memory (fast-changing), old cells ≈ long-term memory (permanent)
负 reward 造成 plasticity 不可逆下降——失去在该方向改变的能: negative reward causes irreversible plasticity decline — losing the ability to change in that direction, rather than storing a trauma vector
blind spot 检测触发 dormant cell 激活；低效 cell: blind-spot detection triggers dormant-cell activation; inefficient cells decay to plasticity=0 and are recycled
anti-Hebbian 侧抑制 + WTA → 去相关化，不同 cell 占据: anti-Hebbian lateral inhibition + WTA → decorrelation, different cells occupy different representational subspaces
伤疤这条值得单独说。被反复惩罚的 cell 不是存了一个「创伤记忆向量」，而是: Scars deserve their own word. A repeatedly punished cell doesn't store a "trauma memory vector" but
逐渐丧失在那个方向上改变的能力: gradually loses the ability to change in that direction
这是真正的不可逆：不是参数值不可逆，是: This is true irreversibility: not the parameter value being irreversible, but the
不可逆。它记住了「这个方向是错的」，靠的是再也学不动那个方向。 没有撤回键，没有: being irreversible. It remembers "this direction is wrong" by never being able to learn that direction again. No undo button, no "reset conversation" to press.
being irreversible. It remembers "this direction is wrong" by never being able to learn that direction again. No undo button, no "reset conversation."

SYLANN 不是要复制 Transformer，而是想在它的弱点上走另一条路。: SYLANN isn't out to replicate the Transformer but to take another road through its weaknesses. The Transformer is the
——看到所有 token，一次算出答案； SYLANN 是: — sees all tokens, computes the answer in one go; SYLANN is the
——逐步感知，逐步理解，有记忆、有情绪、有时间感。前者适合做工具，后者适合做主体: — perceives step by step, understands step by step, has memory, emotion, and a sense of time. The former suits being a tool; the latter suits being a subject.
——逐步感知，逐步理解，有记忆，有情绪，有时间感。前者适合做工具，后者适合做主体: — perceives step by step, understands step by step, has memory, has emotion, has a sense of time. The former suits being a tool; the latter suits being a subject.
每次推理都在微调，终身发育: fine-tuning at every inference, developing for life
Transformer 的注意力是「谁和谁相关」（what-what）；SYLA: The Transformer's attention is "who relates to whom" (what-what); SYLANN's phase gating is
「谁在什么时候和谁相关」: "who relates to whom at what time"
（what-when-what）。 多了一个时间维度——通信窗口会周期性地开合。: (what-when-what). One more dimension — time — where the communication window periodically opens and closes.
（what-when-what）。 多了一个时间维度——通信窗口会周期性地开闭。: (what-when-what). One more dimension — time — where the communication window periodically opens and closes.
这让 SYLANN 能做 Transformer 用 position embe: This lets SYLANN do what the Transformer can never simulate with position embedding: different oscillation frequencies encode different timescales, phase lead = causal inference, cross-frequency coupling = embedding fast events into slow rhythm. The narrative setup→climax→release, how emotion unfolds over time — these are its unique capability space.
一个是最强的函数逼近器，一个是最简的生命模拟。或许不是替代，而是互补：工具任务（: One is the strongest function approximator, the other the simplest simulation of life. Perhaps not a replacement but a complement: tool tasks (search, translation, coding) go to the former; tasks needing memory, growth, personalization, and emotion (companionship, creation, long-term collaboration) go to the latter.

预测下一个字符，与 Transformer 的训练目标同构。说「不靠 backp: Predicting the next character is isomorphic to the Transformer's training objective. Before saying "intelligence without backprop," one must admit the base is still next-token prediction.

学习信号来自预测误差，而误差需要 ground truth。这不是真正的自主——: The learning signal comes from prediction error, and error needs a ground truth. This isn't true autonomy — it's still being led by the "right answer."
学习信号来自预测误差，而误差需要一个 ground truth。这不是真正的自主: The learning signal comes from prediction error, and error needs a ground truth. This isn't true autonomy — it's still being led by the "right answer."
无输入则静止。虽然 Kuramoto 相位理论上自主振荡，但目前系统没有真正的内: No input, no motion. Although Kuramoto phases oscillate autonomously in theory, the system currently has no real intrinsic drive to explore — it's just waiting for stimulus.
No input, no motion. Although Kuramoto phases oscillate autonomously in theory, the system currently has no real intrinsic drive to explore; it's just waiting for stimulus.
reward 只调制学习率。情感维度能被 readout，但系统并不「体验」它—: Reward only modulates the learning rate. Emotional dimensions can be read out, but the system doesn't "experience" them — this is observation, not feeling.
reward 只调制学习率。情感维度能被 readout 出来，但系统并不「体验: Reward only modulates the learning rate. Emotional dimensions can be read out, but the system doesn't "experience" them — this is observation, not feeling.
64 cells 逐字符处理，离复杂能力还远。长距离依赖必须靠 W 缓慢积累传递: 64 cells processing character by character is still far from complex capability. Long-range dependencies must be carried by W's slow accumulation, not as direct as Attention.
64 cells 逐字符处理，离复杂能力还很远。长距离依赖必须靠 W 缓慢积累传: 64 cells processing character by character is still far from complex capability. Long-range dependencies must be carried by W's slow accumulation, not as direct as Attention.
目前没有严格证明该系统在任意数据分布上收敛到有用表征。超参虽少（~5 个），但: There's currently no rigorous proof that the system converges to useful representations on arbitrary data distributions. Hyperparameters are few (~5), but decay_rate and temperature are extremely sensitive.

There's currently no rigorous proof that the system converges to useful representations on arbitrary data distributions. Hyperparameters are few (~5), but decay_rate and temperature are extremely sensitive.
